results.title: ORIC® Pharmaceuticals Announces Initiation of Himalayas-1 Phase 3 Trial in mCRPC Evaluating Rinzimetostat in Combination with NUBEQA® (Darolutamide), Supported by Clinical Collaboration with Bayer
results.description: Initiated Himalayas-1 global Phase 3 trial in patients with mCRPC previously treated with abiraterone
